features.title: Update header text to 'Intentional Industries'
features.description: Modify the header component in layout.tsx to display 'Intentional Industries' instead of 'Loop Harness'. The text must be exactly 'Intentional Industries' (case-sensitive) to match test expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: File app/src/app/layout.tsx contains the string 'Intentional Industries' in the header section
GET http://localhost:3001 returns HTML containing 'Intentional Industries' in the response body
The string 'Loop Harness' does not appear in app/src/app/layout.tsx header section

features.title: Apply white font color to header
features.description: Update the CSS styles for the site header to use white (#ffffff or rgb(255,255,255)) font color. This should apply to the site-title class and any other text elements within the header.
acceptanceCriteria: File app/src/app/globals.css contains a CSS rule for .site-header or .site-title with color property set to white (white, #fff, #ffffff, or rgb(255,255,255))
Running `grep -E 'color:\s*(white|#fff|#ffffff|rgb\(255,\s*255,\s*255\))' app/src/app/globals.css` returns at least one match in a header-related selector

features.title: Add horizontal gradient background to header
features.description: Apply a CSS background gradient to the site header that transitions horizontally from black (#000000) on the left to navy blue (#001f3f or similar) on the right. Use linear-gradient with appropriate direction (to right or 90deg).
acceptanceCriteria: File app/src/app/globals.css contains a background or background-image property with linear-gradient for .site-header
The gradient definition includes both black (black, #000, or #000000) and a navy blue color (e.g., #001f3f, #000080, or similar dark blue)
Running `grep -i 'linear-gradient' app/src/app/globals.css` returns at least one match in a header-related CSS rule

features.title: Verify header rendering with all changes
features.description: Confirm that the header displays correctly with all three changes applied: 'Intentional Industries' text, white font, and gradient background. This task ensures the CSS specificity and element structure work together correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: The response HTML from http://localhost:3001 contains 'Intentional Industries' as visible text
Visual inspection of the page shows a gradient background on the header (developer can check computed styles)
No console errors appear when loading http://localhost:3001 (check browser dev tools or server logs)
features.failureReason: Generator did not finish within the step limit (30 steps).
